title: Neptune Is Put on Display
description: On pages 6–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Shirahoshi. The core beat is neptune is put on display.
scene: The scene follows neptune is put on display, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Shirahoshi.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The ocean forest

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The words of the family of Neptune have dulled your minds.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You have all been goaded into walking willingly to your deaths!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Open your eyes to the truth!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: See for yourselves ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: This once-mighty warrior...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Your beloved Neptune has grown old....!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: Father!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...NghhHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHH

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: His majesty ...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's kind of our fault... that the King got captured like that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...Well, mainly ZORO's...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What have you people been playing at?!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: B - But boss jimbei-san! It was the Neptune army soldiers who attacked nami-chin and the others!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It was all a big mistake ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It is time for us to say goodbye...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...to the old ryuuguu kingdom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: In three hours time, at GYoncord Plaza...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...I will strike the head from this worth- less King's shoulders!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Here in the ryuugu palace... I have found something very interesting.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the letter from the tenryu- Ubito...

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: ...that queen Otohime risked her life to obtain ten years ago!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I destroy it now, it will never be replaced. And here in this box behind me...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...I have the signatures of over half the population of this country ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Jahahah... to think that so many...

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: ...would consent to the foolish notion of joining hands with the humans in harmony...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The people whose names are written in this box have made clear their opposition to my new kingdom. In other words, this is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The message between

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...a list of Filty traitors!!!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: There will be no more treading on the images of Otohime.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That is a test that anyone can clear if they have the courage to conceal their true beliefs.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These signatures are the unshakable proof of who stands with me and who is against me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The people on this list...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...will have to be disposed of!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Such arrogance ....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Arrogance is in the nature of a king. All of us have suffered...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...thanks to your arrogance, Neptune.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: And finally...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I address the straw hat pirates!!

summary: Neptune Is Put on Display. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
